final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original social media cover image for a 小红书 post announcing GPT-image-2 on the Lovart platform.

Style/medium: needs a "高级杂志感" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Kinfolk magazine editorial minimalism, 032c Berlin avant-garde print design, 1990s Wallpaper* magazine tech-meets-luxury spreads; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must use diagonal composition
Subject: must include GPT-image-2 and Lovart as the central theme — platform launch announcement
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs a high-contrast accent color treatment — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart"
Constraints: 
Avoid:
